labels.de: Was hat sich seit Baseline v1.0 geändert?
labels.it: Cosa è cambiato dalla baseline v1.0?
labels.zh: 自基线 v1.0 以来有哪些变化？

payload.prompt: Use the requirements-tracking MCP tools (search_requirements, get_requirement, get_document_section, search_issues, get_issue) to reconstruct everything that changed since baseline v1.0 (frozen 2026-04-30). For every changed requirement, show: the baseline text, each approved diff with its verbatim evidence quote (source, speaker, date) and scope decision (in-scope vs. change order), the current text, and the derived implementation status from linked tracker issues. Also list pending proposals (the unresolved Cloud-vs-On-Premises conflict card, the pending review-queue card, the shadow-scope card for PORTAL-310) and any stale requirement↔issue links. You are reporting, not deciding: never approve, reject, or resolve anything on your own authority — every proposal is decided by a human (Sara or Lena) in the TenderTrace UI.

labels.en: Analyse the latest email for scope drift
labels.de: Analysiere die neueste E-Mail auf Scope-Drift
labels.it: Analizza l'ultima e-mail per scope drift
labels.zh: 分析最新邮件中的范围偏移

payload.prompt: Take the most recent inbound email artifact (e.g. the 'E-Mail Cloud-Anbindung' from Fr. Kern, 2026-06-18) and analyse it for scope drift against the baselined requirement set. Use the requirements-tracking MCP tools: get_document_section to read the artifact, search_requirements/get_requirement to find the affected baseline requirements, and search_issues for related tracker work. For each requirement-relevant statement, classify it (CONFIRMATION / MODIFICATION / NEW_REQUIREMENT / CONFLICT), cite the verbatim quote with author and date, and assess scope (likely in-scope vs. likely change). If a statement is not yet covered by an existing drift card, submit it via submit_proposal — that is your ONLY write path, and the proposal card will wait in the Drift Inbox. Never decide scope yourself: a human (Sara) decides every card. Close with a summary of what now awaits human decision.
